NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Oct-27-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Elder or Dependent Adult Abuse TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204, Judge Ronald Quidachay, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, CSR: Bob Balian, CSR#5220, Bailiff: Deputy Capazzoli.

No appearance by the Petitioner: Pauline Moreno Mendoz.

No appearance by the Respondent: Yemi Doe.

The matter was called at 1:54 p.m. There being no appearances, the matter was ordered off calendar.
